content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -1.3%, Bank Nifty -1.56%, Realty/Auto/PSU Bank weak; only Pharma and IT (defensive INR-hedge) green. VIX +10.45% to 18.60 signals risk-off. Defensives (FMCG, Pharma, Gold) bid hard. CPI risk Tuesday; existing book is well-positioned (Pharma + FMCG + IT overweight) — manage existing risk, no fresh aggressive admits warranted on a -1.3% tape with VIX spiking.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23750,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Gold ETF natural hedge in risk-off; CMP 123.79 vs SL 121.00 (-2.3% buffer). SL well-placed below entry. No trail action — gold-as-hedge thesis intact; let SL absorb normal noise."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 828.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.3% unrealized, current SL 825 is already above entry 820 (locked in). Tightening to 828 (1.3% below CMP 840.15, still respecting 1% trail-gap). FMCG defensive bid hard today on TATACONSUM tape; Q4 PAT +14% YoY. Let it run to target 855."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1357.20,
      "new_target": 1420.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Already at +9.3%, SL 1357.20 is well above entry (locked ~7.8% gain). Current SL sits 1.4% below CMP 1376.70 — exactly at the 1% trail-gap floor; tightening further risks self-stopout. HOLD SL where it is, let trend ride to 1420 target. No-op MODIFY → switch to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1446.90 vs SL 1465.00 — wait, SL is ABOVE CMP. Verifying: stored SL 1465 > CMP 1446.90 means SL already triggered or order pending. Q4 PAT +37% YoY good print May 7; chart wobbling on crude-spike concern. SL at 1465 is broken intraday — position should already be stopping; do not modify, let it execute."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1610.00,
      "new_target": 1740.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.3% with strong Q4 (PAT loss-to-profit, EBITDA +148%). Trail SL from 1600 to 1610 (-1.0% below CMP 1626.50, exactly at trail-gap floor). Pharma at 52w high, biotech ramp catalyst. Original target 1740 stands."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.4%, fresh entry. SL 2760 is -2.1% below CMP 2820.30 — appropriate buffer. Q4 PAT +47% FY26, Odisha refrigerants upsize is a multi-quarter catalyst. Too early to trail; let setup develop."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.5%, CMP 9072 vs SL 9020 (only 0.6% buffer — tight). 3.3x volume surge today suggests institutional accumulation. UltraTech overhang is sector-wide. Let SL fire if hit; don't preempt per Rule 17."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 130,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 351.80 vs SL 354.00 — SL is ABOVE CMP, position is at or beyond the stop. Stock down -4.66% today, broke through stored SL. Per arithmetic: 351.80 < 354.00, stop logic should trigger. Exiting decisively at market rather than waiting. Q4 +30% PAT was good but PSU bank/financials weak; momentum break confirms."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.0%, CMP 10565 vs SL 10440 (-1.2% buffer). Buyback at Rs 12,000 is a hard catalyst floor. Auto sector weak today (-2.11%) but stock outperforming sector. Respect SL; do not preempt."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.3%, CMP 476 vs SL 472 (-0.8% buffer, tight). FMCG sector bid today but DABUR underperforming TATACONSUM/MARICO. Q4 only +7% revenue growth — laggard within FMCG. Let SL absorb; close if hit, don't preempt."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1240.00,
      "new_target": 1290.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.6%, Pharma at 52w high, LAURUSLABS at ATH (1258 today, prior ATH 1223). Trail SL from 1228 to 1240 (-1.3% below CMP 1256.90, respects 1% trail-gap floor). Lock in gain above entry. Q4 PAT +20.5% YoY, sixth consecutive quarter."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.6%, CMP 1226.70 vs SL 1198 (-2.3% buffer). Q4 +21% PAT, hit 52w high today before fading from 1253. SL is sized for normal post-breakout chop; let it absorb. Do not preempt per Rule 17 — failure mode on Day-12 was exactly this."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HFCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "MIS",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "INTRADAY",
      "reasoning": "Pending MIS BUY @ 133.50 placed 5+ days ago is stale; not in today's analysis set, not in watchlist. Leaving as-is — MIS orders should auto-cancel EOD. No new action."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Gold hedge intact; SL 121 absorbing normal pullback."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 828.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail to 828 (1.3% below CMP) to lock in gain while respecting trail-gap floor."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1357.20 already locks ~7.8% gain; further tightening risks self-stopout (gap < 1.5%)."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1465 above CMP — position likely to execute on stop. Do not modify."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1610.00,
      "reasoning": "Lock in above entry; pharma at 52w high."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Fresh entry, SL appropriately placed."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL tight at 9020; respect placement."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL breached (351.80 < 354.00). Exit market."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Buyback catalyst supports; respect SL."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL absorbing normal chop; do not preempt."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1240.00,
      "reasoning": "Pharma ATH momentum; lock in gain above entry."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Respect SL 1198; do not preempt-exit per Rule 17."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Walking through new BULLISH candidates with explicit reject reasons (Rule 18): (1) APOLLOHOSP +0.07 BULLISH — board meeting May 20 (binary, ~7 sessions out, not yet in 3-session window) BUT Healthcare sector already overweight via WOCKPHARMA + LAURUSLABS; adding 3rd Pharma/Healthcare name = cluster cap concern. SKIP. (2) MCX +0.08 BULLISH — at all-time high after +147% 1Y rally, momentum-late entry; R:R unfavorable from these levels. SKIP. (3) BAJAJ-AUTO +0.12 — already held. (4) DABUR/TATACONSUM/MARICO — already held FMCG cluster (3 names, near cluster cap). (5) SUNPHARMA/TORNTPHARM — not analyzed in this batch, defer. (6) SRF/PIDILITIND — already held Chemicals. (7) NIFTYBEES — broad market down day, not adding to a falling tape; CPI Tuesday is a binary macro event. SKIP per macro-day discipline. Deployment 50%; cash at 50.4% is elevated but justified on a -1.3% tape with VIX +10% — this is a genuine risk-off day, not anchored conservatism. Book is already overweight defensives (Pharma, FMCG, IT, Gold). No qualifying new admit this cycle.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book composition: Pharma (WOCKPHARMA + LAURUSLABS) 4.6%, FMCG (MARICO + DABUR + TATACONSUM) 11.5%, IT (COFORGE) 4.1%, Chemicals (SRF + PIDILITIND) 7.5%, Gold (GOLDBEES) 5%, Financials (ABCAPITAL exiting + BAJAJ-AUTO) — well-diversified defensive tilt. ABCAPITAL exit will free ~₹46K cash; total cash post-exit ~₹551K (55%). CPI Tuesday is the binary macro event; staying defensive into it is the right posture. Today's losses are largely unrealized and within SL budget; tomorrow's tape (post-CPI) will dictate redeployment. Daily loss limit untouched (₹75K remaining)."
}
